name: Cucumber, Red Onion and Watercress
recipeIngredient: peeled, scored, cut into equal lengths to fit feed tube vertically
3 large Bunches watercress, washed, stems removed
2 tbsp Snipped fresh chives for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Stand cucumbers in feed tube and slice using medium pressure. Repeat until all cucumbers are sliced.
2. Put cucumber slices, onion, and rice vinegar in a large mixing bowl.
3. Toss well and cover.
4. Refrigerate from 4-8 hours.
5. To serve, drain cucumbers.
6. Toss with oil.
7. Adjust salt and pepper.
8. Arrange watercress leaves in wreath design on serving plates.
9. Arrange cucumbers in center, dividing evenly.
10. Garnish with chives. Serve.
NOTE: Seasoned rice vinegar, available in the Oriental section of most supermarkets, is a blend of mild rice vinegar with a perfect balance of sugar, salt, and water. If you are using rice vinegar, adjust the salt, sugar, and water to taste.
